---
title: "Practice 3"
author: "Jordan Sutherland"
date: "4/22/2022"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## 3b

```{r}
pf(2.5,24,32,lower.tail=TRUE)
qf(0.95,24,32,lower.tail=TRUE)
1.863582/2.5
pf(0.7454328,24,32,lower.tail=TRUE)
```

## 4

```{r}
cornflk <- c(4.61,6.42,5.40,4.54,3.98,3.82,5.01,4.34,3.80,4.56,5.35,3.89,2.25,4.24)
oatbran <- c(3.84,5.57,5.85,4.80,3.68,2.96,4.41,3.72,3.49,3.84,5.26,3.73,1.84,4.14)
t.test(cornflk,oatbran,alternative="greater",mu=0,paired=TRUE,conf.level=0.05)
```
